---
title: Real-Time Gaze Tracking with Event-Driven Eye Segmentation
author:
- Yu Feng
- Nathan Goulding-Hotta
- Asif Khan
- Hans Reyserhove
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/vr22.pdf
talk_source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7jctvusephY
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/edgaze
journ: IEEE VR
year: 2022
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
ext_source: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2201.07367.pdf
award: Best Paper Honorable Mention
pub_number: 58
---
